$comment: Course schema for the Pre-Sold Author Package methodology. The package itself is a ProfessionalService (03-professionalservice.json); this Course entity represents the METHODOLOGY page (/the-method) as structured educational content. Ship this only inside the @graph for /the-method. Do not attach Course markup to /the-package (that would be a Google structured data violation).
name: The 180-Day Pre-Sold Author Method
alternateName: The Six-Month Book and Authority Method
description: The documented methodology behind the Pre-Sold Author Package: how a finished book, a podcast, an audio voice clone, and author authority get built in parallel on a single 180-day clock, with one manuscript delivered by month three and a coordinated launch at Day 180.

audience.educationalRole: Executive, author, or entrepreneur building a book and personal brand

teaches: How a book, a podcast, a voice clone, and author authority compound when built in parallel instead of in sequence
How interviews and a voice corpus compress a manuscript from months of drafting to a delivery by month three
How author authority surfaces (bio pages, contributor citations, a Wikidata Person entry) corroborate each other
How the Legacy Publishing option runs after the manuscript is finished without stalling the launch sequence

hasCourseInstance.name: Pre-Sold Author Package cohort
hasCourseInstance.courseMode: Blended (asynchronous documentation plus synchronous operator delivery)

hasPart.name: Module 1: Foundation (Days 1 to 30)
hasPart.description: Kickoff, voice work, and editorial planning. The podcast launches by Day 30. The Wikidata Person entry seeds and author authority surfaces begin. Interviews start.

hasPart.name: Module 2: Build (Days 30 to 90)
hasPart.description: The manuscript takes shape from the interviews and voice corpus. Podcast episodes ship. Author authority signals accumulate. The first wave of guest appearances feeds the list build.

hasPart.name: Module 3: The Pre-Sell (Days 90 to 180)
hasPart.description: The finished manuscript moves into cover, interior layout, and production through the Legacy Publishing option. Author authority surfaces mature. Guest appearances peak and the waitlist opens for pre-orders.

hasPart.name: Module 4: Launch (Day 180)
hasPart.description: Book on sale. Podcast at scale. A recognized author entity. The audience opted in. Legacy runs retail. PodcastNetwork.org runs launch-week coordination and a post-launch report.
